data.title: Filevine debuts Legal Operating Intelligence System (LOIS) at LEX Summit 2025, offering advanced AI tech for legal intelligence.
data.description: A recently unveiled technology called Legal Operating Intelligence System (LOIS) is set to revolutionize legal intelligence at the annual customer conference LEX Summit 2025 in Salt Lake City. Developed by Filevine, LOIS integrates advanced AI technology to enhance the legal sector's efficiency and connectivity. This innovation represents a significant step forward for the industry and showcases the ongoing evolution in legal technology. The introduction of LOIS at this event signifies a major milestone in advancing the future of legal intelligence and signifies the commitment to leveraging technology for improved performance.
JAPAN LDP CHIEF TAKAICHI SAYS WILL IMMEDIATELY ISSUE ORDER TO COMPILE STIMULUS PACKAGE ONCE CHOSEN IN PARLIAMENT TO BECOME NEXT PM

data.title: illycaffè reveals finalists for Ernesto Illy International Coffee Award 2025, with 27 producers from 9 countries vying for title of Sustainable Coffee of the Year.
data.description: In Trieste, Italy, 27 coffee producers hailing from 9 different countries are vying for the prestigious title of Sustainable Coffee of the Year. This competition marks the 10th anniversary of the Ernesto Illy International Coffee Award, dedicated to the memory of Ernesto Illy, the founder's son.

data.title: 7shifts report shows 67% of restaurants spend over 100 hours per year on payroll. New benchmark aims to improve efficiency.
data.description: A recent report uncovered that a significant 67% of restaurants invest over 100 hours annually on payroll management. The report, released by 7shifts, a popular scheduling and payroll tool for restaurant owners, presents The Restaurant Payroll Benchmark as a solution to this issue. The benchmark aims to provide a structured framework for enhancing efficiency and ultimately driving growth within the industry. The findings shed light on the extensive time spent on payroll tasks within restaurants, indicating a pressing need for streamlined processes to alleviate this burden.

data.title: MergerWare and Mercer partner to enhance M&A deals, combining expertise with digital platform for integration success.
data.description: Mercer, a division of Marsh McLennan (NYSE: MMC) known for its global M&A advisory services, has joined forces with MergerWare, a digital execution platform. This collaboration aims to enhance integration processes by utilizing Mercer's expertise alongside MergerWare's technology. The partnership, announced on Oct. 9, 2025 in New York, is set to provide more efficient and effective integration solutions, ultimately leading to increased success rates in mergers and acquisitions.

data.title: Bridgewater Commons celebrates Diwali with 2-day event on Oct 18 - 19, featuring South Asian culture, music, dance, crafts.
data.description: The Festival of South Asian culture, featuring a mix of traditional and modern music and dance performances, crafts, and giveaways, is set to take place in Bridgewater Township, NJ on October 9-10, 2025. This expansion to two days comes as a response to increasing customer interest. The event aims to highlight the vibrancy and richness of South Asian culture and is expected to draw a large crowd.

data.title: Arizona households see significant increase in income, tens of thousands of new jobs created, and accelerated statewide growth, according to new report.
data.description: Today, the Center for the Future of Arizona (CFA) released a new analysis indicating significant economic progress in the state. The report highlights that households are benefiting from an increase of thousands of dollars each month on average. Moreover, tens of thousands of new jobs have been generated, contributing to a state-wide growth acceleration. This data underscores a positive trend in Arizona's economy, showcasing the success of prioritizing economic development initiatives.

data.title: Harmonic showcases fiber advancements at Network X 2025 in Paris with cOS™ virtualized platform.
data.description: In San Jose, California, on October 9, 2025, Harmonic (NASDAQ: HLIT) announced its participation in Network X 2025 in Paris. The company is known for its expertise in fiber broadband technology and is set to showcase its cOS™ virtualized broadband platform at the event. Harmonic is renowned for accelerating fiber deployments and will be presenting its market-leading solutions at the conference.

data.title: Reetu Gupta, CEO of The Gupta Group, releases poetry collection "Whispers of the Soul" in Toronto on Oct. 9, 2025.
data.description: Renowned CEO Reetu Gupta recently launched her latest creation, Whispers of the Soul, on October 9, 2025 in Toronto. Gupta, who also holds the position of Ambassadress at The Gupta Group, is known for her work as an author and poet. Whispers of the Soul is being praised for its mystical grace and visionary power. This intimate project is expected to make a significant impact in the literary world.

data.title: Southwest Airlines opens bookings for Summer 2026 with increased departures and destinations at Las Vegas and Orlando.
data.description: Southwest Airlines, a leading player in the airline industry, is expanding its services in Las Vegas and Orlando by offering more departures and destinations than any other competitor. The company recently announced the release of its summer 2026 schedule for booking on Southwest.com®. Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) invites travelers to check out their website for booking flights to these popular destinations.

data.title: Hyperscale Data (NYSE: GPUS) reduces $30M debt year-to-date, boosting AI and Bitcoin expansion plans.
data.description: Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE: GPUS) has experienced a notable increase in its stock price after achieving a key financial accomplishment. The company has successfully decreased its outstanding non-affiliated debt by $30 million year-to-date. This strategic move not only improves Hyperscale Data's financial position but also enhances its ability to adapt to different financial situations. The reduced debt levels will allow for faster growth, especially in its primary sectors of artificial intelligence (AI) and Bitcoin data hosting based in Michigan. These operations are managed by its subsidiary, Alliance Cloud Services, LLC (ACS). The reduction in debt was made possible through a combination of debt repayments and conversions, significantly boosting the company's available funds and setting the stage for further expansion.

data.title: NSF and Impossible Foods certify Impossible® Beef and Burger as first plant-based meats in NSF Certified for Sport program.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, NSF and Impossible Foods have revealed that Impossible Beef and Impossible Burger have received the NSF Certified for Sport® designation, a groundbreaking achievement for any plant-based meat or fresh food item in the program's history. This certification confirms that Impossible Foods' plant-based beef and burger products are beneficial for athletic lifestyles, offering delicious flavor and impressive nutrition. This marks the first time for a plant-based meat or fresh food product to receive this certification.

data.title: Shake Shack to announce Q3 2025 financial results on 10/30/25 with conference call at 8am ET. CEO and CFO hosting call. Phone dial: (877) 407-0792.
data.description: Shake Shack Inc. (NYSE: SHAK) is set to announce its third quarter 2025 financial results on October 30, 2025, prior to the market's opening. The company will hold a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET, featuring Rob Lynch, CEO, and Katie Fogertey, CFO. To participate, individuals can join the call at (877) 407-0792.

data.title: Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ) will report Q3 2025 financial results on Oct. 30, 2025 with a pre-recorded session at 6:30 am ET and live webcast Q&A at 9:30 am ET.
data.description: Hanover, Pennsylvania – Utz Brands, Inc. (NYSE: UTZ), a prominent U.S. producer of branded Salty Snacks and a growing small-cap equity, declared intentions to reveal its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2025 on Thursday, October 30, 2025. The report will be released at 6:30 a.m. Eastern Time, including a press release, pre-recorded comments from management, and a slide presentation. Furthermore, a live webcast Q&A session with analysts is scheduled for 9:30 a.m.

data.title: Luxembourg SWF invests 1% of $900M fund, approx $9M in Bitcoin ETFs.
data.description: Luxembourg's national investment fund has decided to invest approximately 1% of its portfolio, valued at around $900 million, into Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs), amounting to roughly $9 million.

data.title: Perfect Corp. partners with Erborian for 'Find Your Match' TikTok campaign using virtual try-on.
data.description: Perfect Corp. has joined forces with Erborian to introduce the "Find Your Match" experience featuring the latest CC Crème. Erborian's new CC Crème, a revitalized version of the popular current CC Crème, offers a lightweight feel and radiant look with added skincare advantages. This collaboration showcases Perfect Corp.'s AI and AR technology solutions and Erborian's innovative beauty product, emphasizing a seamless blend of technology and skincare. Perfect Corp. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol PERF.

data.title: MarineMax promotes Charles Cashman to drive yacht sales growth globally as Senior VP of Global Yacht Sales. MarineMax is the world's largest boat and yacht retailer (NYSE: HZO).
data.description: In OLDSMAR, Florida, MarineMax, Inc. (NYSE: HZO) revealed that Charles A. Cashman, the Chief Revenue Officer, is transitioning to Senior Vice President of Global Yacht Sales within the Company. With MarineMax being the largest recreational boat and yacht retailer globally, Cashman will focus on enhancing growth in the yacht and superyacht divisions. His new role will involve overseeing yacht sales and global superyacht operations.

data.title: ECD Automotive Design reveals first custom Porsche build, Project Gravette, adding to their bespoke lineup.
data.description: Today, ECD Automotive Design unveiled their newest custom build, marking their first collaboration with Porsche on Project Gravette. The project includes a bespoke design and features a unique transformation for the luxury brand. This marks a significant milestone for ECD, as they continue to expand their portfolio of bespoke builds.

data.title: NKGen Biotech (OTC: NKGN) addresses confusion on OTC Expert Market trading status with displayed $0.00 stock price.
data.description: In Santa Ana, California, on October 9, 2025, NKGen Biotech, Inc. (OTC: NKGN) addressed queries from shareholders about its trading status on the OTC Expert Market and the appearance of a $0.00 value for its Common Stock on some financial platforms. NKGen is a biotech company dedicated to advancing autologous and allogeneic natural killer ("NK") cell therapies. The stock in question has a par value of $0.0001 per share.
